debug_points.description: These images appear to be taken from a boat or watercraft on dark water, not from a road. The images show water surface meeting what appears to be a dock, seawall, or shoreline edge in some frames, and a silver BMW SUV (X3 or similar) parked nearby. This is not a roadway location - it appears to be a marina, dock area, or waterfront in Panama City based on the coordinates.

These images show the roof/hood of a vehicle covered with promotional decals and logos including Hertz, Thrifty Car Rental, Tucán Country Club & Resort, Panama tourism branding, Ricardo Perez S.A., and 360 Explora Panama. The camera appears to be mounted on or very close to this vehicle, making the road surface largely invisible in most frames.

No imagery is available for this location. All 9 images display a 'Sorry, we have no imagery here' message from Google, indicating Street View coverage does not exist at these coordinates (8.98340, -79.51990). No road surface can be assessed.

All 9 images show extreme motion blur from what appears to be a vehicle-mounted camera capturing at high speed. The road surface cannot be properly assessed due to the severe image distortion. Glimpses of green grass, hedges, palm tree, and what appears to be paved road surface can be seen, but no clear view of actual road damage is possible.

All 9 images show severe motion blur artifacts making the road surface completely unreadable. The images appear to be captured from a moving vehicle with significant camera shake or processing errors, resulting in diagonal streaking patterns across the entire frame. No road features, damage, or surface details can be reliably identified.
